children.label: Features

children.description: Features, workflows, and comparisons for the SSOT Registry model.

children.label: What are ADRs in SSOT Registry?
children.title: What are ADRs in SSOT Registry?
children.description: ADRs matter because SSOT Registry turns them into named, normalized, inspectable SSOT records instead of leaving developers to reconstruct intent from scattered documents. This features guide explains the concept, shows where it fits in the SSOT canon, and points to practical next steps for a governed single source of truth. Explain adrs and identify the next command-backed SSOT Registry step.

This courses guide explains the concept, shows where it fits in the SSOT canon, and points to practical next steps for a governed single source of truth. By the end, vibe coders can explain features, run ssot spec sync, and decide the next registry action.

This lessons guide explains the concept, shows where it fits in the SSOT canon, and points to practical next steps for a governed single source of truth. Practice one concrete cli workflows task and verify the result with ssot release promote.

This glossary guide explains the concept, shows where it fits in the SSOT canon, and points to practical next steps for a governed single source of truth. Explain specifications and identify the next command-backed SSOT Registry step.
